contextual.title: Voice and Swallowing Outcomes Following Revision Anterior Cervical Spine Surgery
contextual.text:
Summary: Evaluate voice and swallowing outcomes post operatively.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Patients undergoing revision anterior cervical spine surgery 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Primary pathology of the upper aero-digestive tract other than mild chronic pharyngitis, pre-existing vocal cord paralysis.
